---
title: "Établi Focus"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-focus.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Offline tool</span>

> Track focus sessions by category.

Établi Focus is a Pomodoro and focus-session tracker. Work blocks are recorded by category (deep work, review, admin, research, manuscript, data analysis) with configurable focus and break durations and local notifications. Timers survive force-quit and reboot. Fully offline.

![Focus — today view with categories and history.](../_screens/0.1.0/01-today.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Anyone wanting to record focused work cleanly across multiple sessions — for self-tracking, for invoicing, or as a data backbone for a more deliberate work setup.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. The app runs fully offline; sessions and categories live only on the device.

## Installation

Établi Focus is **under active development**. There are no App Store, Google Play or F-Droid releases yet.

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-focus/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/).
